rows.label: qev085605_MSG0001
rows.name: It seems there's a secret to these plants.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085605_MSG0002
rows.name: Yeah. I'll head back to HQ first to report this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085605_MSG0003
rows.name:
Is it alright if I receive the reward and hand it over to you later?
I'll treat you as thanks then, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085605_MSG0005
rows.name: Then we'll meet up at the cafe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085605_MSG0006
rows.name: I'll call Lao too, so you can leech off him as much as you want.[ST:wait ]
